title: The True Vanilla
description: This modpack elevates your 1.21.11 game into the ultimate True Vanilla experience, blending the refined Vanilla Tweaks aesthetic with fluid animations and top-tier Fabric performance.
body:
I built this pack because I wanted to experience Minecraft exactly as it was meant to be—but with the performance and smoothness of a modern Fabric setup. It’s centered entirely around a clean, vibrant aesthetic that honors the game's classic look. I’ve layered in subtle animation and physics mods to make the world feel alive and fluid without losing that timeless, simple style.

On the technical side, it’s loaded with Sodium, Lithium, and top-tier optimization tools so it runs incredibly fast. It also includes thoughtful quality-of-life tweaks like seamless UI handling and navigation aids to keep your focus on the gameplay. If you want a highly polished, incredibly smooth experience that stays completely true to the heart of vanilla Minecraft, this is it. No clutter, just the game you love, perfected. Thanks for downloading! ![Thanks for downloading!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8fc796b45b6b4d9f8cefbc5767c2d760a3c7f61_0.webp)
